title: If I Should'nt Be Alive
content:
If I should n't Be Alive
    When the robins come,
    Give the one in red cravat
    A memorial crumb.

    If I could n't thank you,
    Being just asleep,
    You will know I'm trying
    With my granite lip!
meaning:
"If I Should'nt Be Alive" is a quintessential example of Emily Elizabeth Dickinson's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
